name: Grilled Barbeque Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill. Make sure grates are clean and lightly rubbed with oil.
2. Brush chicken breasts with 2 tablespoons peanut oil and season with salt and pepper.
3. Place on grill and cook for 5 minutes, basting with prepared barbeque sauce.
4. Turn over, baste with barbecue sauce, and cook for about 5 minutes more or until juices run clear.
5. Serve one breast per person, garnished with Watermelon Pico de Gallo (separate recipe).
